allocateToMarket(address,uint256).details: Only callable by the market maker agent

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

returnFromMarket(uint256,uint256).details: The market must transfer (principal + fees) to this contract BEFORE      calling this function. This function only updates accounting.      Access-controlled to valid Prophet markets — safe to trust.

params.fees: Any additional fees earned on top of principal
params.principal: The original allocated amount being returned

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addLiquidity(uint256).notice: Add USDT to the pool without issuing shares — for testing only

agent().notice: Market maker agent wallet — only address that can call allocateToMarket

allocateToMarket(address,uint256).notice: Deploy liquidity from pool into a newly created market

availableLiquidity().notice: USDT currently idle in the pool (not deployed to markets)

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposit USDT and receive LP shares proportional to contribution

factory().notice: ProphetFactory — used to validate market addresses

getPoolStats().notice: Full pool stats in one call — used by frontend

marketAllocation(address).notice: market address → USDT allocated to it

marketReturned(address).notice: market address → has the market returned funds?

maxAllocationBps().notice: Maximum % of pool per market in BPS (default: 500 = 5%)

minAllocationBps().notice: Minimum % of pool per market in BPS (default: 50 = 0.5%)

rescueTokens(address,uint256).notice: Rescue non-USDT tokens accidentally sent to the contract

returnFromMarket(uint256,uint256).notice: Market calls this after returning funds to update pool accounting

setMaxAllocationBps(uint256).notice: Update maximum allocation per market in BPS

setMinAllocationBps(uint256).notice: Update minimum allocation per market in BPS

sharePrice().notice: Current value of 1 LP share in USDT (6-decimal precision)

totalAllocated().notice: USDT currently deployed in active markets

totalDeposited().notice: Cumulative USDT deposited via deposit() and addLiquidity()

totalFeesEarned().notice: Cumulative fees returned from all resolved markets

totalMarketsAllocated().notice: Count of markets that have received an allocation

totalPoolValue().notice: Total pool value: idle + deployed capital

totalShares().notice: Total LP shares currently in circulation

utilizationRate().notice: Pool utilization rate in BPS (deployed / total)

withdraw(uint256).notice: Burn LP shares and receive proportional USDT back

withdrawableAmount(address).notice: How much USDT a given LP can withdraw right now
